content.en:
It was a little troublesome to control the refining of the realm soldiers, and Ye Tian's cultivation had not yet reached the realm of the eternal controller, so it was even more difficult to refine and control the realm soldiers.

However, Ye Tian had many duplicate bodies, so he could let one copy body slowly refine and control the realm soldiers without affecting his cultivation.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian was refining the Realm Soldier while trying to create a top-notch space-time control technique.

In addition, Ye Tian was also inquiring about where to buy the essence blood of the life of the Eternal Control Boundary River, and he needed to buy a copy ~ to devour.

He has now condensed the Supreme Control Body, and he can use the Secret of Devouring to devour the essence blood of the Eternal Control Realm River.

However, no matter how powerful the Eternal Control Realm is, it is not easy to fall, and even if it does fall, there may not be anyone who sells the essence blood of the life of the Eternal Control Realm River.

Therefore, it was still very difficult for him to purchase the essence blood of the life of the Eternal Master, the Boundary River.

The most important thing is that Ye Tian has not yet entered the circle of the Eternal Master, otherwise it would be easier.

Therefore, Ye Tian also got rid of the white-bearded old man to help buy it, but it is not clear whether the white-bearded old man can buy it.

In a flash, thousands of boundary river years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already refined the Hundred Realms Stick, and he was not far from creating a top-notch space-time control technique.

In addition, there was also news from the white-bearded old man, and there was really a way to acquire the essence blood of the life of the Eternal Control Realm River.

this day.

Ye Tian met with the white-bearded old man.

"Old man with white beard, do you have any news about the Eternal Control of the Life Essence Blood of the Realm River?" Ye Tian asked.

The white-bearded old man nodded: "An auction at the level of an Eternal Master is about to start, and according to the information I have obtained, one of the auction items is a blood of the life of the Eternal Control Realm River, and there are quite a few of them. You can go and prepare a large number of Jiehe Coins, and I'll do my best to bid for you when the time comes. But I can't take you there, that auction is only for the Eternal Master. "

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he began to sell a large number of his treasures one by one and exchange them for Boundary River Coins.

After a period of time, Ye Tian gathered a large number of Jiehe coins, and then gave them to the white-bearded old man.

After that, he had to wait.

After some time, the white-bearded old man came to Ye Tian.

"Endless Lord, with good luck, finally captured the essence blood of the life of the Eternal Control Realm River. "

The white-bearded old man handed over a large amount of essence blood to Ye Tian, and also gave Ye Tian the remaining boundary river coins.

"Thank you, Old Man Whitebeard!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

If it weren't for the white-bearded old man, he probably wouldn't have had a chance to buy such essence blood.

"It's just a trifle!"

The white-bearded old man said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to retreat to refine the essence blood of the life of the Eternal Control Realm River.

I saw that he swallowed these essence blood and began to refine the essence blood with the secret of swallowing.

Bang!!

Countless energies began to refine the Heavenly Body, and even the Secret of Swallowing was somewhat reluctantly refined.

I have to say that it is indeed very difficult for the half-step Eternal Master to refine the essence blood of Zhuang Heng's life in the realm of controlling the realm

If it weren't for him, if it were some other half-step Eternal Master, he would have exploded and died a long time ago.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's physical body became stronger and stronger.

This refining has helped him too much, and the secret of swallowing is enough to defy the sky, and even the essence blood of the life of the eternal control realm river can be refined, improving his own life level.

After a long time, this batch of essence blood was completely refined.

"The level of life has been greatly improved, and the physical body has been increased several times!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Moreover, he is also about to create a top-notch space-time control technique, and his strength will inevitably skyrocket again.

With the help of the secret of enlightenment, dozens of years have passed.

Finally, Ye Tian created a top-notch space-time control technique.

The space-time control technique he created this time was created in full cooperation with the Hundred Realms Stick, so that he could exert its power even more.

He named this space-time mastery technique a Thousand Kills!

Gather the power of a thousand paths into one point, kill with a point, penetrate everything, and smash all things.

In the middle of the boundary river.

Ye Tian's two replica bodies were testing the power of the Thousand Dao Kills.

One of the replica bodies had nothing, and the other replicated body held the Hundred Realms Stick and performed a thousand kills.

Airplanes!

The power of a thousand paths is completely under his control, forming a little power.

Rumble!

The Hundred Circles Stick shattered everything and blasted over.

All the rules along the way shattered and crushed everything, and the terrifying aura seemed to annihilate all the rules.

Click!

The other replica body was bombarded and killed without any resistance, and the body was completely annihilated.

"This blow is strong enough to inflict a heavy blow on the weaker Eternal Master. "

Ye Tian estimated.

Of course.

This alone is not enough, he also needs to create another speed-type top-notch space-time control technique, and he is ready to deduce the space-time control technique of Void Walking to the level of a top-notch space-time control skill.

Ask for flowers

If speed doesn't work, the Eternal Master will run away, and he won't be able to chase him down.

If he could, he would also like to extrapolate the Forbidden Realm to the level of the top Temporal Mastery, so that he could ensure that he could kill a weaker Eternal Master, thus completing the second test of the Great Being.

With the experience of creating the first top-notch space-time control technique, Ye Tian's next creation speed was much faster.

This time, only twenty thousand realm river years had passed, and Ye Tian had successfully created the second top-notch space-time control technique, which was still named Void Walking by him, but it was many times more powerful than the previous Void Walking.

Next, Ye Tian deduced the space-time forbidden domain with all his might, and it took 18,000 river years to deduce the space-time forbidden domain to the level of the top space-time control technique.

......... ，....

In this way, Ye Tian possessed three top-notch space-time control techniques, and his strength had almost reached a level that was difficult to improve.

Although he could continue to create more top-notch space-time mastery techniques, even if he created a few more top-notch space-time mastery techniques, the increase in strength would be minimal.

"It's time to complete the second test. "

Ye Tian muttered.

But which Eternal Controller can do it, the other Eternal Masters have no hatred for him, and it is not easy for him to kill people.

If you want to pick a weaker Eternal Master, and it is suitable for his goals, such an Eternal Master is not easy to find.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian continued to investigate the information, and after many investigations, he finally made a decision.

"Godless City Lord!"

Although this Eternal Master has been an Eternal Master for some years, his strength is not very strong.

The reason why Ye Tian chose him was because he had no background, but his behavior made him very unhappy.

The Godless City Lord is good at controlling people, he has controlled many geniuses, and the entire lifespan of Godless City is under his control, and he can kill any living creature with a single thought.

There are as many as a million Peak Legendary Realm Lords and Half-Step Eternal Masters who are controlled by him, and they must do what he asks and provide him with resources, otherwise they will be killed by him.

Many of the Eternal Masters were unhappy with the Godless City Lord, but they did not threaten themselves, so the other Eternal Masters only rejected him and would not kill him.

This also has something to do with the fact that the godless city lord never offends other Eternal Controllers, so many Eternal Masters turn a blind eye.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian decided to Yu. _
